title: Meta stock climbs nearly 3% on report of planned layoffs to offset AI spending
summary_full: Meta is planning capital expenditure of up to $135 billion in AI-related costs in 2026, which raised investors' fears around unsustainable spending.
summary_public: Meta is planning capital expenditure of up to $135 billion in AI-related costs in 2026, which raised investors' fears around unsustainable spending.
